name: GEMS
description: Predicts binding affinity (pK) of protein-ligand complexes from 3D structure using graph neural networks. Enhances interaction graphs with ANKH, ESM2, and ChemBERTa language model embeddings. Ensemble inference for robust and generalizable binding affinity scoring.
capabilities: Predicts binding affinity (pK) of protein-ligand complexes from 3D structure using graph neural networks
Enhances interaction graphs with ANKH, ESM2, and ChemBERTa language model embeddings
Ensemble inference for robust and generalizable binding affinity scoring

complex_structure.description: Protein-ligand complex structure in PDB format

ligand.description: Ligand structure in SDF format (if not included in complex PDB)
